name: Ace Auto Sales
notes: AutoManager CMS (automanagerprodcdn.azureedge.net, client 028619). Inventory list pages embed vehicle data in data-display* attributes (year, make, model, trim, mileage, drivetrain). Prices not in list-page data-attributes (data-displayprice='$'); extracted from individual VDP pages via .internetvalue span. 20 paginated list pages fetched + 231 VDP pages. Feed/API probes: /vehiclefeed.xml (redirect 404), /inventory.xml (invalid security ID), /api/inventory (empty response), /InventorySearch (empty response). Scrape-justification: no documented JSON feed, API, or XML export found; AutoManager does not expose a public data endpoint.
